basic_details.job_title: Mizoram PSC Junior Grade Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Mizoram Public Service Commission (Mizoram PSC) Junior Grade Notification 2026 has been released on 26 May 2026 on the official website mpsc.mizoram.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Mizoram PSC Junior Grade Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Bachelor Degree with 5 years of regular service in the grade of Inspector of Statistics

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Mizoram PSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Mizoram PSC Junior Grade of MPE&SS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Mizoram PSC Junior Grade of MPE&SS posts is 29th June 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by Mizoram PSC for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Mizoram Public Service Commission (Mizoram PSC) has announced a total of 1 vacancy for the Junior Grade of MPE&SS post through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Junior Grade of MPE&SS post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Junior Grade of MPE&SS position, candidates must possess a Bachelor Degree and have completed 5 years of regular service in the grade of Inspector of Statistics.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Junior Grade of MPE&SS post will receive a salary as per Level 10 in the Pay Matrix, as determined by the Mizoram Public Service Commission.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Mizoram PSC Junior Grade of MPE&SS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates can apply online through the official Mizoram PSC website. The application process involves filling out the form, uploading documents, and submitting it before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Mizoram PSC Junior Grade of MPE&SS Recruitment 2026 will be based on a Limited Departmental Examination.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the notification, there is no application fee for candidates belonging to the PwBD category. Other category fees are not specified, so it's best to check the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Mizoram PSC recruitment is LDE (Gazetted Post) No. 17 of 2026 – 2027.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for the Junior Grade of MPE&SS post?
faq.answer: The Junior Grade of MPE&SS post is a Full Time government job opportunity offered by the Mizoram Public Service Commission.
